name.description: The name of the owner (individual or team).

github.description: The GitHub handle of the owner (individual or team).

owner.description: List of owners for the SIG, which can include individuals or teams.

project.description: The URL of the project associated with the SIG, which must be defined in the OpenTelemetry community repository.

board.description: The URL of the project board associated with the SIG

labels.description: A list of predefined labels representing the SIG's states or needs.

items.description: Labels representing the areas this SIG is responsible for (e.g., area:k8s, area:db).

areas.description: A list of areas assigned to the SIG. Used for automation and context mapping.

items.description: Paths under the `model` folder that the SIG is responsible for (e.g., model/k8s, model/db).

directories.description: A list of directory paths owned by the SIG.
